extensionDescription.message: Control, collapse, and manage long ChatGPT conversations.

v130IntroTitle.message: Long conversation control has been improved

v130IntroBody.message: The original cleanup workflow is still here. This update adds safer visual hiding, current view status, and clearer long conversation controls.

v130IntroAction.description: One-time v1.3 update intro dismiss action

safeModeDesc.message: Only hides older exchanges on screen. Safest and easiest to restore.

removeModeDesc.message: Temporarily trims older exchanges from this view. Refresh ChatGPT to restore.

safeModeSelected.message: Visual Control selected: older exchanges stay in the page and are hidden visually.

removeModeSelected.message: Refresh Restore selected: older exchanges are discarded from this view and restored by refreshing ChatGPT.

roundStatsBadge.description: Popup badge showing visible and total rounds

visibleRoundsValue.description: Metric value for visible and total rounds

errorKeepRoundsRange.description: Error message for invalid keep rounds range

errorNotChatGPT.message: Please use this feature on a ChatGPT page
errorNotChatGPT.description: Error message when not on ChatGPT page

errorScriptLoad.message: Unable to load extension script, please refresh the page and try again
errorScriptLoad.description: Error message when script fails to load

errorOperationFailed.message: Operation failed: Please refresh the page and try again

successCleaned.description: Success message after applying view control

errorOperationFailedRetry.message: Operation failed, please refresh the page and try again
errorOperationFailedRetry.description: Error message for failed operation with retry

errorNotFound.message: No conversation messages found, please ensure you are on a ChatGPT conversation page
errorNotFound.description: Error message when no messages found

infoNoNeedClean.message: Current conversation has only $ROUNDS$ exchanges, no need to hide older exchanges
infoNoNeedClean.description: Info message when no need to hide

successCleanedDetailed.message: Organized this view: $REMOVED$ older exchanges hidden, $KEPT$ recent exchanges visible
successCleanedDetailed.description: Success message with detailed remove info

successCollapsedDetailed.message: Hidden $HIDDEN$ old exchanges, kept the latest $KEPT$ exchanges visible
successCollapsedDetailed.description: Success message with detailed visual hide info

errorCleanFailed.description: Error message prefix for view control failure

autoMaintainEnabled.description: Status message when auto-maintain is enabled

autoMaintainDisabled.description: Status message when auto-maintain is disabled

featureFeedbackSubtitle.message: Tell us what you'd like next

featureFeedbackSubmit.description: Feature feedback survey entry submit action

featureFeedbackDone.description: Feature feedback survey entry completion action

featureFeedbackDoneConfirm.message: Feedback completed? This entry will no longer be shown.
featureFeedbackDoneConfirm.description: Confirmation shown before permanently hiding the feedback entry

featureFeedbackPrivacy.message: We do not collect chat content
featureFeedbackPrivacy.description: Privacy reassurance shown in the feedback survey entry

panelSearchNoResults.message: No results in currently loaded messages.
panelSearchNoResults.description: Conversation panel no search results hint

panelJumpOldest.description: Conversation panel jump oldest visible button

hiddenOlderMessages.description: Placeholder shown where old messages were hidden

removedOlderMessages.message: Older exchanges hidden from this view until refresh ($ROUNDS$ exchanges)
removedOlderMessages.description: Placeholder shown where old messages were removed

turnOffAutoMaintainToExpand.message: Turn off auto-maintain to show hidden exchanges.
turnOffAutoMaintainToExpand.description: Hint shown when auto-maintain disables placeholder expansion

expandHiddenMessagesFailed.message: Unable to expand hidden messages. Refresh the page and try again.

domWarningTitle.message: ChatGPT page structure may have changed - extension cannot detect conversations
domWarningTitle.description: Icon tooltip when DOM structure change is detected

domWarningMessage.message: ChatGPT page structure may have changed. Extension is temporarily unable to work. Please contact the developer.
domWarningMessage.description: Warning shown in popup when DOM structure change is detected

badgeTitle.description: Tooltip for the extension icon badge
